summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of ThesisVault (FastAPI + React + MongoDB). Backend pytest suite (33 tests) covers auth (login/me/register + admin self-register block + duplicate), full thesis lifecycle (create draft -> submit -> supervisor approve -> admin publish -> public list/search -> unpublish), role guards (student blocked from /submitted, /approved, /publish, /review; supervisor blocked from /publish), file download (public for published, 401 for unpublished, ?token= query fallback), public search by query/year, and seeded sample-data sanity. Frontend Playwright suite (12 flows) covers public hero + 3 published cards + search by keyword/year, login demo-fill for student/supervisor/admin, student dashboard listing seeded theses, create-thesis form, supervisor pending review modal with all 3 decisions, admin publish/unpublish toggle visibility, register form (admin role not selectable). All critical features working as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~540 lines and mixes models, routers, helpers and startup; consider splitting into routers/, models/, deps.py for maintainability when the project grows.

GET /api/theses/submitted returns submitted+changes+rejected+approved together; the route name and OpenAPI summary are misleading. Consider renaming or splitting per status, or adding a 'status' query filter.

File download via ?token= query param exposes JWT in browser history/server logs. Acceptable for MVP since it is required for <a> tags, but consider short-lived signed URLs or a one-time download token in a future iteration.
auth.py defines get_current_user_factory and require_roles but server.py implements its own current_user/require_role -- dead code in auth.py should be removed to avoid confusion.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True; combined this is silently downgraded by browsers. For production, set CORS_ORIGINS env explicitly.
@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; switch to lifespan context manager.

success_rate.frontend: 100% functional (one logout wait_for_url quirk in test script, not an app bug — verified subsequent logins/logouts in same run)

test_credentials: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md: admin@thesisvault.io/Admin@12345, supervisor@thesisvault.io/Super@12345, student@thesisvault.io/Student@12345 — all working.
seed_data_creation: Test suite created TEST_-prefixed transient theses (TEST_Thesis_Workflow, TEST_NoFile, TEST_UI_Created_Thesis) and TEST_<uuid>@example.com user accounts via API/UI. These are draft/approved leftovers in MongoDB; backend has no admin delete endpoint so they remain. Recommend adding a cleanup utility or filtering TEST_ data from dashboards in future.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file lives at /app/backend/tests/test_thesisvault_api.py and is fully passing — reuse for regression. The student demo dashboard now contains 8 theses (3 published seeded, 1 draft seeded, 1 submitted seeded, plus 3 TEST_ items added by this run). If the next iteration adds delete/cleanup endpoints, prune TEST_ entries first. The /api/files/{id}?token= query-token fallback is intentional for public PDF anchor tags. Demo-fill testids are demo-fill-{role}; per-row admin testids are admin-publish-{id} / admin-unpublish-{id}; supervisor review uses supervisor-review-{id} -> review-modal -> review-decision-{approve|reject|changes} -> review-submit-button.
rca of the issue: No app bugs found. The single Playwright failure ('Logout student: Timeout waiting for **/' ) was a test-script issue — the wait_for_url('**/') was triggered after click but page was already on a route that matched, so the navigation 'load' event was missed. Logout itself is working: subsequent supervisor login succeeded against a clean session, and Sign-out from supervisor and admin worked in the same run.
